E-PACC Ukraine
Home Map

Spatial analysis

Interactive map visualisation of the spatial distribution of recorded structural damage incidents across Ukraine. The map is dynamically generated based on the selected assessment year and time frame filter type. Use the controls on the left to adjust the parameters and explore the data.

to

Click an oblast on the map, or a bar/segment in the charts below, to filter everything to that selection.

National Frame Total
0

Spatial Damage Assessment Mapping Profile

Top Oblasts by Reported Damage

Damage by Infrastructure Type

Extent of Damage

Charts reflect the year, window frame range, and any active selection filter above.
